title: (not) Epic swords pack
description: Adds some models for swords and axes
body:
I decided to make a resource pack for myself and my friends that will add cool unique weapons for each of them. And then I thought why not share it.

## Dependencies
- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for Forge
- [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) for Fabric

If you are using versions from 1.13 to 1.20, then do not pay attention to the red mark on the resource pack, it still works on these versions.

## Weapons:

- Uki (sounds as "Yuki") - Rename any sword or axe to "Uki"

- Kazue - Rename any sword or axe to "Kazue"

- Amaia - All tridents will look like in cyberpunk and some drowned will have implants. (requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) for Fabric)

- Yoko and Chiasa - Rename any sword or axe to "Yoko and Chiasa"

- Penguin sword - Rename any sword or axe to "Penguin sword"

- Oozora - Rename any sword or axe to "Oozora"

- Akimizu - Rename any sword or axe to "Akimizu"

- Onyxia - Rename any sword or axe to "Onyxia"

- Tupizza - Rename any sword or axe to "Tupizza"
<!-- (end of document) -->
